texto: It's a brand new day and a brand new life
autor: let's not dare to allow anyone or anything to stop us from seizing every opportunity that today brings.
explicacao: Citação de let's not dare to allow anyone or anything to stop us from seizing every opportunity that today brings. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It's a brand new day and a brand new life” articula reflexao, inspiracional, brand em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
